title: Hard Rule 13 + immutable SRC-CAND IDs + Research Confidence protocol
reason: Candidate discovery must not terminate research. Source IDs must be immutable handles. Search prioritization needs an RC score with Reasoning Log that does not revive deprecated engineering confidence percentages.
decision: Adopt Hard Rule 13 — Research Never Stops at One Source.
Adopt immutable SRC-CAND-###### IDs; metadata is mutable; year/type not encoded in ID.
Adopt Research Confidence (RC 0–100) + Reasoning Log for SRC-CAND hunt prioritization only.
RC must not promote Hard Rule 4 stages or authorize geometry freeze/extraction.
Register SRC-CAND-000001/000002/000003 as NOT_ACQUIRED for front suspension topic.
Legacy CAND-FORD-BBAS-2019 / CAND-FORD-SM-2019 become aliases only.
DT-D037 PRIMARY_SOURCE_REQUIRED remains in force; prioritize acquiring SRC-CAND-000001.
Frozen kernel and component-passport rc1 unchanged.
